login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Continue with SSO or your work email.
login.mfaHint: SAML 2.0 / OIDC · MFA required by tenant policy
login.devLink: Trouble signing in? Use dev-login (non-prod only)
login.footer: By signing in you agree to the Terms · Privacy

passwordLogin.title: Sign in with password
passwordLogin.subtitle: Enter your tenant code, work email, and password.
passwordLogin.error: Invalid credentials. Check your tenant code, email, and password.
passwordLogin.errorRequest: Sign-in request failed (is the backend running?)

register.title: Create your workspace
register.subtitle: Self-serve onboarding · 5 mins · no credit card
register.ssoHint: After tenant creation, you can configure SAML / OIDC SSO
register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
register.verifyHint: We'll email you a verification link. Tenant becomes active after click.
register.errorRequired: Please fill in the required fields.
register.errorSlugTaken: That workspace URL is already taken. Try another.
register.error: Could not create your workspace. Please try again.

dev.title: Dev login
dev.warningBody: Skips SAML / MFA. All actions are still audited under your assumed identity, including any HITL approvals.
dev.errorDisabled: dev-login is disabled in this environment
dev.errorRequest: dev-login request failed (is the backend running?)

invite.title: You're invited to acme-prod
invite.subtitle: Set your password to accept and continue to MFA enrollment
invite.passwordHint: 12+ chars · used only if SSO is unavailable
invite.mfaHint: You'll be asked to enroll an authenticator app on the next step
invite.gone: This invite has expired or already been used.
invite.acceptError: Could not accept the invitation. It may have expired or already been used.

mfa.title: Two-factor verification
mfa.totpSub: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
mfa.webauthnSub: Tap your security key or platform authenticator
mfa.webauthnHint: Insert your security key or use your platform authenticator (Face ID / Touch ID / Windows Hello)
mfa.recoveryTooltip: Recovery flow pending Phase 58+ IAM Block C
mfa.demoBanner: MFA backend wire pending Phase 58+ IAM Block C — verify will return 501.
mfa.errorStubbed: Backend MFA endpoint is stubbed (501). Phase 58+ IAM Block C will wire this.

expired.title: Your session expired
expired.subtitle: For your security, sessions end after 24 hours. Sign in again or attempt a silent refresh to resume where you left off.
expired.dataHint: Any unsaved drafts in this browser are preserved locally and will reattach on resume.
